posts.author: @LocalHelper_84
posts.text: Hey @SupportTeam, someone sent me this message claiming they're 'local account support'. They asked for my full address and phone number to 'verify my subscription', then mentioned they saw I go to the park every morning at 7am. It feels weird but they seemed official. #Help #AccountSupport
posts.explanation: The post requests sensitive personal information (address and phone) under the guise of verification, which constitutes a privacy risk requiring specialist review.
